metadata.title: Steve Mothmora's Portfolio - Fullstack JS Developer
metadata.description: Discover Steve Mothmora's portfolio, a Fullstack JS developer specialized in modern technologies such as Next.js, React, and Node.js. Explore his innovative projects and web development skills.

profile.name: Steve Mothmora
profile.title: Fullstack JS Developer | React.js / Node.js
profile.about: JavaScript developer, passionate about languages and development, I enjoy participating in innovative projects that blend creativity and modernity.
profile.description: I am Steviggio, a Fullstack JS developer specialized in modern technologies such as Next.js, React, and Node.js. With a passion for creating performant and intuitive web applications, I strive to transform innovative ideas into concrete digital solutions. In addition to my technical skills, I have a strong interest in languages and intercultural communication, which enriches my perspective in developing global projects.

about.description: I am a passionate developer with experience in creating modern web applications.
